entity.label: Shaaraim
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A city in the plain of Judah (1 Sam. 17:52); called also Sharaim (Josh. 15:36).

nodes.label: Shaaraim
nodes.description: A city in the plain of Judah (1 Sam. 17:52); called also Sharaim (Josh. 15:36).

verses.text: And Sharaim, and Adithaim, and Gederah, and Gederothaim; fourteen cities with their villages:

And the men of Israel and of Judah arose, and shouted, and pursued the Philistines, until thou come to the valley, and to the gates of Ekron. And the wounded of the Philistines fell down by the way to Shaaraim, even unto Gath, and unto Ekron.
